recentTweets.text:
Following the Supreme Court’s disappointing decision, Congress must take action to protect the integrity of American citizenship.

My Ban Birth Tourism Act makes it clear that birth tourism and those seeking to exploit our laws has no place here.
https://t.co/SRFrOjhD2J

An illegal alien should never be voting in a U.S. election.

It’s that simple.

Under this administration, there’s no escaping justice. This alleged fraud ringleader has been extradited from Somalia to face charges for the $250M scheme that stole from kids and taxpayers during the pandemic.

No fraudster is off the hook anymore.
https://t.co/QAXnQ8P5yC

Restricting visas for far-left terrorists and their networks who incite violence, sabotage our country, and threaten our security is common sense. 

This administration is standing up for our homeland each and every day. https://t.co/U14t5yNKMp

We must never back down to the Chinese Communist Party.

Especially when it comes to U.S. elections.

The White House has launched a one-stop shop election integrity site! 🇺🇸
https://t.co/lhc8bdIYVo
Pass the SAVE America Act.

We need to pass my Ban Birth Tourism Act, and we need to shut down the birth tourism industry.

It is now in the hands of Congress to stand up for the value of American citizenship. https://t.co/l0vY2Jl5iJ

Under Biden: A record 2.2M+ border encounters in a single year and millions released into our country.

Under Trump: Crossings at 50-year lows, zero releases for over a year, and ICE hitting a record 238 arrests in one day in South Texas.
https://t.co/ykvQqiECxG

American citizenship is sacred, but birth tourism exploits our laws and undermines the responsibilities that come with it.

This week, I’m reintroducing the Ban Birth Tourism Act to close this loophole and protect the integrity of our immigration system. https://t.co/kUNCOxN5gV

Tamboli’s Pasta and Pizza’s decision to deny service to National Guard members is absolutely disgraceful.

Our brave service members deserve the utmost respect for all they have to done to protect Memphians.

It was an honor to serve alongside my friend Senator Lindsey Graham. A fearless patriot who never shied away from tough fights, always stuck to his principles, and worked across the aisle to strengthen our nation.

May he rest in peace. https://t.co/cQG2UazZHa
Senator Graham fought until the very end of his life to secure our elections. We must continue this fight in his honor. https://t.co/QAc0UPZqYU

Radicals want to abolish the Senate, gut our Constitution, and utterly transform America. 

It’s an assault on the values our country was founded on, and we will not surrender our institutions, freedoms, or the American way of life to these extremists.
https://t.co/kmCODuKiwK
That autopen is sure going to need some more ink soon.

If Jack Smith’s lips are moving, he’s lying.

We now know he obtained text messages from 44 members of Congress even though he’s on record denying this. What else did he lie about? https://t.co/j6bf011veg

Following the Supreme Court’s disappointing ruling on birthright citizenship, it’s clear Congress needs to step up to the plate to combat birth tourism. 

We need my Ban Birth Tourism Act, and we need a strong AG like @DAGToddBlanche who will stand up for American citizenship. https://t.co/pVOj4vPJT3

Carjacking crimes are out of control, and we need to empower prosecutors with more tools to go after violent carjackers. 

Grateful to have @DAGToddBlanche’s support for my Federal Carjacking Enforcement Act to make certain that these criminals are held accountable. https://t.co/HYNlNuUP0E

RT @FaulknerFocus: DEMS DON'T CARE ABOUT DEFRAUDING THE AMERICAN PEOPLE?

@MarshaBlackburn https://t.co/xfUuFBOJbC

RT @FaulknerFocus: "IF YOUR LIPS ARE MOVING, YOU'RE LYING"

@MarshaBlackburn says Jack Smith abused his authority while investigating Presi…

We are so grateful for the Memphis Safe Task Force.

This is the way to fight crime, and the statistics speak for themselves. We need to confirm @DAGToddBlanche to keep the momentum up and keep Americans safe. https://t.co/FMBY896sR0
RT @RapidResponse47: .@MarshaBlackburn praises the success of the Memphis Safe Task Force under @DAGToddBlanche's leadership at @TheJustice…
RT @EricLDaugh: 🚨 JUST IN: In a bombshell moment, Sen. Marsha Blackburn just exposed Sen. Dick Durbin (D) to his FACE for BLOCKING the rele…
RT @RapidResponse47: .@MarshaBlackburn: "@DAGToddBlanche is doing a wonderful job. President Trump was correct in nominating him to be the…
RT @RapidResponse47: .@MarshaBlackburn: "I would like to make you aware that when @SenatorDurbin was chairman in the last Congress, I tried…

Great news ahead of tomorrow’s Senate Judiciary Committee hearing to confirm @DAGToddBlanche as AG.

Under his leadership at @TheJusticeDept, we’re already seeing results like the largest-ever trade fraud crackdown with over $1 billion in recoveries.
https://t.co/GKdYhzNlHa

Shelby County DA @SteveMulroy901 is the last person in the state who should be lecturing us about public safety.

Steve would rather attack law enforcement and let violent criminals off the hook than protect the people of Memphis.
https://t.co/p4spmfuRtW

When state and local law enforcement cooperate with @ICEgov, more criminals get caught. 

3 of these criminals got in under Biden’s catch-and-release policies. Thankful our state is working with ICE to keep Tennesseans safe after 4 years of Biden’s Open Border. https://t.co/OMvNPKukZz
RT @NEWSMAX: “It is something that is trying to circumvent what it means to be a U.S. citizen and to game the system in order to have a chi…

Tens of thousands of children are born every year in the U.S. to birth tourists. 

We need to end this. I am reintroducing my Ban Birth Tourism Act this week to stop foreigners from degrading the value of U.S. citizenship. https://t.co/lE5ORsQUiI
RT @WhiteHouse: PRICES FALLING, CPI FAR BELOW EXPECTATIONS! https://t.co/fm7rQjc409

Tomorrow, the Senate Judiciary Committee will begin the process to confirm @DAGToddBlanche as AG. 

While Democrats try to turn this into a circus, Republicans are focused on getting him through to wipe out more fraud, end two tiers of justice, and hold criminals accountable. https://t.co/zAimlMMHJY

Tennessee is continuing to lead in quantum innovation!

Thanks to @GovBillLee and @CommishTNECD, a new $3M funding commitment will create jobs and drive economic growth in our state.
https://t.co/VrmYJaXuCU

That’s exactly right, @RonDeSantis!

Tennesseans love Tennessee because we WON’T be bullied by the woke mob, we protect unborn children, and we firmly reject radical leftist gender ideology. Do better, @CNBC.
The Volunteer State showed up and showed out for the Great American State Fair! What a wonderful opportunity for Americans from across the country to enjoy a piece of the great state we call home.

Two years ago, a deranged assassin tried to silence President @realDonaldTrump. 

But @POTUS showed unbreakable courage that day and continued a movement. That moment still inspires a nation to fight for America. https://t.co/MtswKDMEhV

Thank you to our water rescue teams and first responders working to restore roads and power. 

We will continue working with local and federal agencies to ensure resources and assistance reach affected Tennesseans.
https://t.co/sK2M5wbj7C

RT @MikeEmanuelFox: Senator @MarshaBlackburn  vows to honor Lindsey Graham with SAVE America Act 

https://t.co/EfHhcGe0hL 

#FoxNews #FoxN…

Honoring Senator Lindsey Graham’s legacy means pushing forward America First legislation on election integrity, border security, and the rule of law. 

We must pass these bills in his honor and secure our nation as he fought so hard to do. https://t.co/vmlQkpXMoA

Senator Lindsey Graham was a fearless patriot who championed bipartisan debate, strong borders, election integrity, and America First policies. 

We will miss him greatly, and we’re so grateful for his legacy of service. https://t.co/dCU2wTuSKV

Last night, our nation lost a dedicated public servant in my friend and colleague, Lindsey Graham.

He devoted his life to serving the people of South Carolina and this nation. My prayers are with his family, friends, staff, and all who loved him. May he rest in peace.

The Democrats have made their mission clear: uproot our Constitution, open our borders, and destroy the American way of life as we know it.

Tennesseans and Americans alike wholeheartedly reject this message. https://t.co/AGmsx4fTb7

My heart goes out to Cathy Sims’ family, friends, and the @myTDOT team as they grapple with this tragic loss. 

I encourage all Tennesseans to say a prayer for them today.

RT @BrendanCarrFCC: This is a good and important win for artists—thanks to Senator Blackburn's leadership.

For a long time, many musicians…

This announcement from @GM proves the future of manufacturing is in Tennessee.

Thanks to @realDonaldTrump’s America First agenda, we’re seeing more investment in American factories, more jobs for American workers, and a stronger economy for Tennesseans.

After I sent a letter to @FCC sounding the alarm about radio stations taking advantage of artists, @BrendanCarrFCC took decisive action to defend them. 

Today’s agreement between the FCC and @iHeartRadio will ensure the creative community is protected from exploitation.

It was a great day to unveil the Donald J. Trump Bridge with @SecScottBessent and members of the Trump family in Jefferson County. 🇺🇸
 
This bridge will ensure East Tennessee remains a crucial artery of our nation’s transportation system. https://t.co/EXnuXKVhuX
RT @SecScottBessent: It was an honor to join the official unveiling of the President Donald J. Trump Bridge along Interstate 40 in Dandridg…

Every single day @POTUS and @VP are wiping out more and more fraud across the federal government.

Joe Biden enabled fraudsters. President Trump is putting them behind bars.
https://t.co/ij2xGGbxgB

Yet another case of a noncitizen illegally voting in our federal elections.

There are no excuses for this. We need to secure our elections by passing the SAVE America Act.
https://t.co/rsBYua3Vub

Billions of tax dollars are lost to fraud every year.

By passing my Fraud Accountability Act, we can send every foreigner who defrauds the U.S. government right back to where they came from and strip the citizenship of those who come to America to steal from us.

After the Supreme Court’s recent ruling, it is more urgent than ever that Congress pass my Ban Birth Tourism Act. 

We need to put a stop to this practice once and for all.
https://t.co/EV3lkNDDbX

Sanctuary states refusing to cooperate with federal law enforcement are risking American lives.

My Stop Greenlighting Driver Licenses for Illegal Immigrants Act would crack down on states that issue licenses to illegals or refuse to share information on criminal aliens.

RT @WhiteHouse: Trump Accounts are here, and there's no reason not to cash in. 💰

If your child was born from Jan. 1, 2025 - Dec. 31, 2028…

Biden’s open border surge created a 30% spike in home prices and 20% jump in rent. 

Illegal immigration hurts the pocketbooks of American citizens. Thankfully @realDonaldTrump has ensured we have the most secure border in history.
https://t.co/aRL7bsGcXM

This country is the greatest force for freedom and opportunity in the world, and the American dream is what sets us apart.

Joy has America to thank for her tremendous wealth. If she’s so embarrassed, why doesn’t she join Rosie O’Donnell in Ireland?
https://t.co/uUu0qZkvic

Giving the next generation the opportunity to invest in American companies and build generational wealth is monumental. 

@realDonaldTrump and @SecScottBessent’s leadership is securing a more prosperous future for America’s children.
God bless America!

One year ago, President @realDonaldTrump signed the Working Families Tax Cuts into law.

By preventing the largest tax hike in history, Republicans ensured more money stays in your pockets and that American families are stronger.

Promises made, promises kept.
